example_prompt: Retrieve the current merchant account balance and pending amount before initiating a payout.

input_schema.description: No request body or query parameters required.

amount.description: Available balance — funds that can be transferred immediately.

pendingAmount.description: Pending balance — typically corresponds to card payments awaiting settlement.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Defaults to XOF.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the balance was recorded.

gotchas: This endpoint uses the balance-management microservice, not the pay microservice. The base URL is https://api.bictorys.com/balance-management/v1 — not https://api.bictorys.com/pay/v1. Using the wrong base URL returns 404.
amount is the available balance (withdrawable immediately). pendingAmount is separately tracked and may include card payments waiting for settlement — it is not yet available for payout.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
